2026-04-22T02:26:32.5345443Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5345952Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5346354Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5346716Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5347005Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5347228Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5347392Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5347568Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5347749Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5347981Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-22T02:26:32.5348181Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m

Each thread contains logically grouped review comments made on the same code location during pull request reviews.
